lessons.title: Understanding LLM Behavior
lessons.description: User understands that LLMs generate text based on patterns, not intelligence.

lessons.title: Core Prompting Techniques
lessons.description: User can apply zero-shot, few-shot, and role prompting.

lessons.title: Prompt Structure Framework
lessons.description: User learns a repeatable prompting formula: [ROLE] + [CONTEXT] + [TASK] + [CONSTRAINTS] + [OUTPUT FORMAT]
topics: Converting vague prompts to structured prompts

lessons.title: Iteration & Refinement
lessons.description: User understands prompting is iterative and improves outputs step-by-step.

lessons.title: Real-World Applications
lessons.description: User applies prompting to real problems.

lessons.title: Advanced Prompting
lessons.description: User handles complex tasks and breaks problems into steps.
